name: 母女對質摔證據
description: Andrea拿出父親車內發現的出軌證據當面質問母親，打破了Lillian的所有辯解。證據的出現是壓倒性的一擊，也是女主多年隱忍後的爆發。
tags: 證據被拿出的瞬間＋母親表情的崩裂＋第三方（Nate前妻）在場增加的尷尬張力

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: I never did anything to betray your father. / This is what I found in dad's car. What excuse do you have now? / How dramatic. I'm really enjoying the show of a mother and daughter turning against each other.
examples.context: 證據被拿出的瞬間＋母親表情的崩裂＋第三方（Nate前妻）在場增加的尷尬張力
